bets.match: Miami Heat vs Los Angeles Lakers

Jonathan Isaac is also absent from the official report. Without confirmed Wagner absence, the franchise player edge that justified the pick evaporates entirely. Additionally, Jonathan Isaac's status is unconfirmed. The core rationale — covering -5.5 on road without their best player — no longer applies if Wagner is active. Cancel per cancel_criteria: 'New information fundamentally changes the edge.'
